programme.title: King of Culinary S5 - EP 2
programme.desc: Returning from Season 2, the next contender Yun Yun has spent the past 5 years sharpening her skills, rising from housewife to culinary instructor. The mentee facing her guesses the main ingredient correctly, what bonus will that bring? Just when the chefs think they have it all under control, double Surprise Attacks strike, throwing the arena into chaos. Can chef complete his dish under pressure?

programme.title: Highway to Somewhere - EP 16
programme.desc: Y declares, in Nick’s presence, he’s decided to forgive Jane as she requested. Nick is upset that Jane’s relented and doesn’t believe that she just wants them to move on from this. He suspects Y has something on her. Jane denies that and urges him to just drop it, but Nick insists Y isn’t going to leave them alone. True enough, Y is waiting to act, except his target turns out to be Nick, not Jane.

programme.title: Hong Kong Chef’s Culinary Adventures - EP 10

programme.title: Legend of the Female General - EP 17
programme.desc: A female general with a gentle appearance but a strong inner spirit, and a male general with a cold exterior and internal but with stronger martial prowess. They join forces to combat deceit, help the weak, and eliminate external threats.

programme.title: Joy of Life 2 - EP 18
programme.desc: The drama continues from the first season of the Joy of Life trilogy, following the story of Fan Xian as he gains a stronghold in the court to eventually overthrow Emperor Liu Yu.

programme.title: Two Worlds Apart - EP 4
programme.desc: In Istanbul, one of Europe's wealthiest cities, a huge divide stands between the classy Istiklal Street and the adjoining area of Tarlabasi. The city's oldest slum Tarlabasi is infamous among locals for its widespread crime. Yet the rundown neighbourhood is a vibrant kaleidoscope of diverse ethnicities and cultures, drawing in refugees, migrant workers and the poor who forge on despite adversity.

programme.title: Home In Toa Payoh - EP 1
programme.desc: Baomei, Pengkun and Guocheng are childhood friends from Toa Payoh. Baomei is a thrifty bachelor and factory foreman. Pengkun, a skilled technician, often sneaks off early to be with his family. Guocheng is a successful insurance salesman with a loving yet nagging wife. Together, they and their families deal with the gossipy, quarrelsome Auntie Fen and her frequent clashes with Guocheng’s father-in-law.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 58
programme.desc: Shizhen discovers that Renyu has arranged a blind date for her. Enraged, she tells Renyu that Madam Yin has been in contact with Liandou. Renyu then confronts Madam Yin, and the two end up in a heated argument.

programme.title: Circle of Life - EP 2
programme.desc: At the Gansu Endangered Animal Protection Center, lives the only population of saiga antelopes in China. Their caretaker, Zhao, has worked with them for 20 years, yet still cannot get within three meters of them. Their instinctive wariness toward humans seems deeply ingrained in the very genes of the saiga antelope.

programme.title: Giant Panda Yun Chuan and Xin Bao - EP 2
programme.desc: Since Bai Yun arrived at the San Diego Zoo in 1996, giant pandas have quickly become its most treasured and beloved residents. The arrival of Yun Chuan and Xin Bao is highly anticipated — they are set to become the zoo’s next superstars. To welcome them, the zoo is renovating its original panda exhibit, now named Panda Ridge, designed to closely recreate the pandas’ natural habitat and provide them with a comfortable new home.

programme.title: Hotel Del Luna - EP 2

programme.desc: A natural, drug-free patch using Far Infrared (FIR) and acupoint therapy to relieve cough, throat irritation, and phlegm. Provides up to 6 hours of comfort, promoting easier breathing and restful sleep. 远红外线结合穴位理疗，有效缓解咳嗽、喉咙不适与痰多，促进血液循环，舒缓感冒、流感或病毒后持续咳嗽。舒适持久达6小时，日夜皆宜，让呼吸更顺畅、睡眠更安稳.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol® is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100% pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness—benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages. NatureFarm's碧容健®，源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物，是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品。经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证，全面帮助抵御氧化压力，守护大脑、眼睛、心脏、关节、肌肤及血糖健康，适合各年龄层日常保健

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Vileda EasyWring Spin Mop & Bucket Cleaning Bundle Set

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Mobot AURA X 4-Wheel Mobility Scooter
programme.desc: One click folds or unfolds the AURA X. Lightweight, portable, and airline-approved, it’s safe, stylish, and travel-ready. iF Design Award 2024 winner—effortless mobility anytime, anywhere. 一按遥控器即可折叠或展开,轻巧便携，折叠后像行李箱一样拖行，配备安全认证电池, 可带上飞机。获iF设计大奖 2024，让日常出行和旅行轻松自在。

programme.title: Jalan Ampas - EP 6
programme.desc: Jalan Ampas is a drama of two parellel storylines - one a period drama and the other an investigative melodrama set in the present.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 29
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Tuah 13 S4 - EP 6
programme.desc: Fatah, Sufiandy and Alistar are ready to tackle 13 questions for a shot at 13,000! Will their determination and brotherly energy be enough? Who will they pick as their celeb ally? Find out in Tuah 13!

programme.title: Remuk - EP 10
programme.desc: A tie that binds can also be a tie that breaks. Family is meant to be a sacred bond, yet conflicts, mistrust, and unspoken pain can weaken it. When that bond cracks, can it ever be mended the way it once was? Or what if there is no recollection left like in Samad and Melissa’s relationship, where memory and connection have faded?

programme.title: Papa Ricky - EP 43
programme.desc: Zara steals Gibran’s car to take Alisya and Jaz on a day trip to the beach. At the same time, Nurin drops a bombshell, revealing to Riqmal that she is Zara’s mother.

programme.title: Oru Manithanin Kathai - EP 2
programme.desc: Oru Manithanin Kathai is a first of its kind docu-drama series that sheds light on ex-offenders and their return journey. Reintegration into the society and life beyond prison are the baseline for this series. Each episode dwells and tells stories of individuals who had been through the wrong and rough path served their sentences yet breaking stereotypes to be successful in life now.

programme.title: Kannae Kaniamuthe S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Sathish and Shamini’s relationship comes to light when they are discovered by Sara, Charu discovers the identity of the anonymous advocate, and Kayal gets upset when a video call with Lavanya tugs at her heart, prompting a meltdown. How will this newcome advocate’s presence affect Charu, and will Radha be able to reason with her young daughter amidst her own feelings?

programme.title: Ticket Pottaachu - EP 7
programme.desc: Pestle and Mortar dives into the immersive experience of preparing staples in the most authentic means possible, a culinary experience like never before. It is a cooking shows that brings the audience onto roads less travelled. Each week brings the audience to exotic destinations with their own culture, stories, festivals and needless to say, epicurean ensemble. Back to basics-No more gas stoves and buying fish from the markets, pick up your firewood and start the fire!

programme.desc: Doctors, Engineers and Lawyers – the most sought after occupations generation after generation. Is there more to this occupational trend’ than meets the eye? Our panelists from three different generations share what has and hasn’t changed, and how much jobs have evolved over the years.

programme.desc: Brothers Palani and Vetri live in a village where Palani is a farmer. Vetri, a driver, goes to Chennai for a better job and, unfortunately, gets into an altercation with underworld gangster Essakki.

programme.desc: "Abiyum Naanum" is a heartwarming family drama that follows 12-year-old Abimanyu, a boy genius on the autism spectrum, as he navigates the challenges of adolescence, school, and family life with a perspective that transforms the mundane into the magical.

programme.title: Kannae Kaniamuthe S3 - EP 5
programme.desc: A comedic client tests the patience of Mike and Sara. On the other hand, Shamini gets upset when she realizes that her relationship is to be kept lowkey. An emotional family discussion ensues about coming clean with Kayal, while Charu has her suspicions about Nila and her intentions. Are the decisions being made, the right ones?

programme.title: Binge Café with Anu Hasan Season 5 - EP 5
programme.desc: In this engaging interview, actor Atharvaa and director Nelson Venkatesan open up about their film DNA, sharing behind-the-scenes moments and insights into their creative process. Atharva discusses his trust in the director's vision, while Nelson talks about how he crafts compelling scenes. The duo also shares their admiration for co-star Nimisha and the standout performances of the supporting cast.

programme.title: DNA
programme.desc: A new mum with BPD believes her baby was switched after birth. While others doubt her, her reformed addict husband races to find their real child before time runs out.
